name: Beijing Zuojiang Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Zuojiang Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the design, research and development, production, and sale of hardware platform and boards related for network information safety applications. It operates through Products Sales; and Subcontracted Research and Development segments. The company's products include secure heterogeneous dual host platforms and secure homogenous dual host platforms. It serves the military sector. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Beijing, China.
